views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Shows currently reading books with progress bars, today's reading stats (pages, minutes), reading streak, and annual book goal progress ring

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Log a reading session: select book (or add new), enter pages read, time spent, update current page, and add session notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap of reading activity by day, date-grouped reading session list with book titles, pages read, and duration per session

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly reading pace chart, genre distribution pie chart, books finished over time bar chart, reading speed trends, and personalized insights

views.name: LibraryView
views.purpose: All books organized by reading status tabs (Currently Reading, Finished, Want to Read, Paused) with progress indicators, ratings, and page counts

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentlyReadingBooks
viewModelComputedProperties.type: [(title: String, author: String, currentPage: Int, totalPages: Int, progressPercent: Double)]
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Unique books with status .currentlyReading, deduped by title, using latest entry's currentPage and totalPages to compute progress percentage

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalPagesReadToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of pagesRead for all entries with today's date

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalMinutesReadToday
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of minutesRead for all entries with today's date

viewModelComputedProperties.name: booksFinishedCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of unique book titles that have at least one entry with status .finished

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days (ending today or yesterday) with at least one reading session logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum consecutive days with reading activity across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyPagesRead
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of pagesRead for entries in the current calendar week (Monday–Sunday)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyReadingTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily pages read for the last 7 days, used for the weekly trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyBooksFinished
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Books finished per month for the last 6 months, used for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageReadingSpeed
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average pages per hour across all sessions where both pagesRead > 0 and minutesRead > 0; formula: totalPages / (totalMinutes / 60)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean rating across all finished books (entries with status .finished and rating > 0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: genreDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of unique book titles per genre, sorted descending, for pie/donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: yearlyBookGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of annual reading goal achieved: booksFinishedThisYear / annualBookGoal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageSessionDuration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean minutesRead across all sessions where minutesRead > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyPagesVsPreviousWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in total pages read this week vs last week; formula: (thisWeek - lastWeek) / lastWeek * 100

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of human-readable insight strings generated from current data: streak status, pace changes, genre preferences, reading speed trends, goal progress alerts

dailyGoal.description: Target number of pages to read per day

annualBookGoal.description: Target number of books to finish per year

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one reading session with pagesRead > 0 is logged on that date. Streak is consecutive qualifying days ending at today or yesterday.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track weekly pages read vs previous week (percentage change), monthly books finished trend over 6 months, reading speed trend (pages/hour rolling 7-day average), and session frequency (sessions per week).
insights: Streak milestone alerts: 'You've read 7 days in a row — your longest streak!'
Pace comparison: 'You read 40% more pages this week than last week'
Goal tracking: 'At your current pace, you'll finish 28 books this year (goal: 24)'
Speed insight: 'Your reading speed has increased to 35 pages/hour, up from 28 last month'
Genre diversity: 'You've read 5 different genres this month — your most diverse month yet'
Book completion: 'You're 85% through Dune — about 2 sessions away at your pace'
Inactive nudge: 'You haven't logged a session in 3 days — pick up where you left off?'
Top genre: 'Fiction is your most-read genre with 8 books this year'
